code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut have = false
  mut max_v = 0
  mut min_v = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        mut j = i
        while j < n
          match string.byte_at(input, j)
          when Some(c)
            if is_ws(c)
              j = n + 1
            else
              j = j + 1
            end
          when None
            j = n + 1
          end
        end
        let stop = if j > n
          j - 1
        else
          j
        end
        let tok = string.substring(input, i, stop)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if not have
            max_v = v
            min_v = v
            have = true
          else
            if v > max_v
              max_v = v
            end
            if v < min_v
              min_v = v
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        i = stop
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  if not have
    Err("no input")
  else
    println("max=#{max_v}")
    println("min=#{min_v}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
